title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.225 - No state college or university to seek land grant designation or research designation held by other institutions
text:
174.225.  No state college or university to seek land grant designation or research designation held by other institutions. — No state college or university shall seek the land grant designation held by Lincoln University and the University of Missouri or the research designation currently held by the University of Missouri.
(L. 2005 S.B. 98 § 1, A.L. 2018 H.B. 1465 merged with S.B. 807 & 577)
